description: Generate a grouped descriptive analysis of the Tooth Growth dataset located at /home/ga/Documents/JASP/ToothGrowth.csv. Configure the dose variable as an ordinal type. Perform a descriptive statistics analysis on len split by both supp and dose, including the Mean, Standard Deviation, and 95% Confidence Interval for the Mean. Create a raincloud plot visualization using a colorblind-friendly palette. Save the completed analysis as /home/ga/Documents/JASP/ToothGrowth_Raincloud.jasp.
